PROMPT: I'm building a multi-asset momentum report and need your help with the following analysis. First, fetch the 90-day daily price history (from 2024-07-01 to 2024-09-28) for three tech stocks: AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA. From that large dataset, identify which of the three stocks had the single highest closing price on 2024-09-27 (the second-to-last day). Remember that stock symbol and its closing price on that date. Next, fetch the 14-period RSI (daily interval, last 30 data points) for all three stocks. From the RSI results, find the most recent RSI value for the stock you identified as having the highest close on 2024-09-27, and note whether it is overbought (RSI > 70), neutral (30–70), or oversold (< 30). Then, fetch the daily MACD (default periods 12/26/9, last 30 data points) for that same stock. From the MACD output, extract the most recent macd_hist value and note whether it is positive or negative. Finally, fetch the current real-time quote for that same stock and report: (1) the stock symbol, (2) its closing price on 2024-09-27, (3) its most recent RSI value and overbought/neutral/oversold classification, (4) its most recent MACD histogram value and positive/negative classification, and (5) its current real-time price from the quote.
